home.title: Code shapes the future.
home.subtitle:
Kazakhstan's #1 platform for developers, designers and product managers.
No middlemen. No spam. Direct contact with tech leads only.
home.whySubtitle: We removed everything unnecessary from the hiring process, keeping only what matters for professional growth.
home.fastTrackText: Your application goes directly to the hiring manager's Telegram. No long HR-screening waits. Average response time — 4 hours.
home.verifiedText: We manually verify every company. No scams and no shady schemes.
home.stackText: Search for jobs by technology, not job title: Spring, React, K8s, Go.
home.salaryText: See real salary ranges on the Kazakhstan market. We collect data from thousands of offers so you know your worth.
home.ecosystemSubtitle: We've combined tools that used to be scattered across different places. Everything for your growth in one ecosystem.
home.resumeText: Create a professional resume in 5 minutes. Smart hints, PDF export and templates.
home.trackingText: A Kanban board for your applications. Track statuses from 'Sent' to 'Offer' without chaos.
home.growthText: Personal course and book recommendations. Level up the skills you're missing.
home.brandText: Create a company page that sells your culture. Video covers, office photos and employee stories.
home.freshJobsSubtitle: Best offers from the last 24 hours
home.ctaText: Create a profile in 5 minutes and companies will start sending you offers.

mentors.empty: No mentors found for current filters. Try broadening your search.
mentors.heroTitle: Find a mentor beyond the standard career path
mentors.heroSubtitle: Not just 'consultations' — live sessions with real task reviews, resume feedback, interview prep and growth strategy. Choose an expert by tech stack and level up faster.
mentors.applyDoneText: Thank you! An admin will review your profile and get in touch.
mentors.bioPlaceholder: Brief description of you as a specialist
mentors.motivationPlaceholder: Why do you want to become a mentor?
mentors.applyHint: After submission, the application will appear in the admin's mentor applications section.
mentors.errorSubmit: Failed to submit application. Please try again.

recommendations.heroTitle: Level up in IT without boring templates
recommendations.heroSubtitle: Courses, books and guides assembled like an interactive growth map: choose a track, combine materials with mentoring and move toward an offer faster than the classic path.
recommendations.ctaText: Connect with a mentor to turn these resources into a personal strategy: pace, practice, checkpoints and reaching the next level.
